# Support

Thank you for using the School Management System! We're here to help you get the most out of the project.

## 📚 Documentation

Before reaching out, please check our documentation:
- [README.md](../README.md) - Project overview and installation
- [PROJECT_PLAN.md](../PROJECT_PLAN.md) - Project status, plan, and issues
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute to the project

## 💬 Community Support

### GitHub Issues

If you've found a bug or have a feature request, please [open an issue](https://github.com/your-repo/schoolmanagement/issues). Please use the appropriate template:
- [Bug Report](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md)
- [Feature Request](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)

### Discussions

For general questions, design discussions, or sharing your ideas, please use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/your-repo/schoolmanagement/discussions).

## 🆘 Professional Support

If you need professional support, custom development, or consulting services, please contact:
- 📧 Email: **support@example.com**
- 🌐 Website: **[https://example.com/support](https://example.com/support)**

## 🛡️ Security

If you've found a security vulnerability, please refer to our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md). **Do not open a public issue.**

---

<p align="center">
  Thank you for being part of our community!
</p>
